_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: We used MEF Nf1 −/− E1A-p53 cells to assess the effects of 472 small molecules on the growth and survival of NF1-deficient neoplastic cells.
details: Used to assess effects of 472 small molecules on growth and survival of NF1-deficient neoplastic cells
